title: 2026-06-28 Vancouver Sea Glass Sunday
summary: Vancouver coastal Sunday set using sea-glass green across a SeaBus terminal ramp, Museum of Anthropology note-taking, Commodore Ballroom music-night queue, and Kitsilano Pool after-swim pause.
summaryJa: バンクーバーのアルバム。色の軸はシーグラスグリーン。構成は移動、ミュージアム、音楽の場、水辺。

images.alt: Adult 18-19 Japanese-centered woman stepping through a Vancouver SeaBus terminal ramp near Lonsdale Quay, turning toward an off-frame friend with quay railings, water, downtown buildings, and North Shore mountains visible, wearing a sea-glass green cropped nylon anorak over an ivory tee, dark charcoal wrap-front city shorts, bare legs, white ankle socks with a sea-glass stripe, black fisherman sandals, silver hoops, hair clip, and a compact crossbody bag
images.title: 01 Transit SeaBus terminal ramp
images.locationDetail: Vancouver SeaBus terminal ramp near Lonsdale Quay

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman at the Museum of Anthropology at UBC, writing in a sketchbook near concrete, timber, glass, and gallery displays while wearing a sleeveless ivory linen waistcoat, deep sea-glass green scarf knotted at the waist, wide charcoal cropped trousers, matte sage opaque ankle socks, brown loafers, sculptural earrings, and a canvas leather tote
images.title: 02 Gallery MOA note

images.alt: Early-20s Japanese-centered woman waiting with a friend outside a Vancouver live music ballroom on Granville Street, laughing in a queue under warm entrance lights while wearing a black asymmetric one-shoulder knit top, short graphite pleated mini skirt, sea-glass green patent belt, matte black patterned tights, low black ankle boots, a cropped silver-gray bomber jacket carried at one shoulder, and hoop earrings
images.title: 03 Music Night Commodore queue

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman after swimming at Vancouver Kitsilano Pool, seated at the outdoor pool edge with beach water, low mountains, towel, tote, and slide sandals nearby, wearing a sea-glass green one-piece swimsuit as a bodysuit, open white linen shirt slipping naturally from one shoulder, washed charcoal wrap board skirt, waterproof silver watch, and damp clipped-back hair
images.title: 04 Swim Kitsilano Pool
